message:
fix: repair two pre-existing test failures on main

TestValidateCheck_DetectsGitConflicts (bd-0bnw): The test created a
.beads/ directory with JSONL conflict markers but no config file.
getBackendAndBeadsDir defaults to "dolt" when no config exists, causing
CheckGitConflicts to skip JSONL scanning entirely and return OK. Fix:
write a metadata.json with backend=sqlite so the conflict scanner runs.

TestUpdateIssueIDUpdatesWispTables (bd-85xn): addWispLabel records a
label_added event in wisp_events as a side effect. The test called
addWispLabel then manually inserted a second event, producing 2 rows,
but asserted only 1 after rename. Fix: expect 2 rows.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/refinery
